sql_array: CREATE TABLE morton_test (id UInt32, value1 UInt32, value2 UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT mortonEncode(value1, value2) AS encoded FROM morton_test;
UPDATE morton_test SET value2 = 50 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, mortonEncode(value1, value2) AS encoded FROM morton_test WHERE id IN (1, 3);
